visual: Bar Graphs (Mode 1: Reading). Same "Books Read This Week" graph (vertical, 4 categories). Data Table visible.
guide: Graphs make comparing easy. You can see which is most and least at a glance by the height of the bars. Who read the FEWEST books this week?.
prompt: Who read the FEWEST books this week?
on_correct: Maya read the fewest books: 4 books. It's the shortest bar.
